hyperedges.label: Control-plane security chain (rate-limit, token, sanitize, audit)

nodes.label: PAPER fills excluded from Treasury/Account state
nodes.norm_label: paper fills excluded from treasury/account state

nodes.label: Strict body validation (attackers attack parsers first)
nodes.norm_label: strict body validation (attackers attack parsers first)

nodes.label: Five system-killer failure modes reproduced deterministically
nodes.norm_label: five system-killer failure modes reproduced deterministically

nodes.label: DB failure degrades to market-data-only mode
nodes.norm_label: db failure degrades to market-data-only mode

nodes.label: Mode gate first, risk engine second
nodes.norm_label: mode gate first, risk engine second

nodes.label: Risk engine sovereign; structural gate all execution passes
nodes.norm_label: risk engine sovereign; structural gate all execution passes

nodes.label: Reserve floor computed from real exchange balance, not fills
nodes.norm_label: reserve floor computed from real exchange balance, not fills

nodes.label: Strip axios config so API keys never leak into logs
nodes.norm_label: strip axios config so api keys never leak into logs

nodes.label: MEXC v3 WS migrated to protobuf Aug 2025
nodes.norm_label: mexc v3 ws migrated to protobuf aug 2025

nodes.label: REST seed before first protobuf delta
nodes.norm_label: rest seed before first protobuf delta

nodes.label: Async fill delivery mirrors exchange WS
nodes.rationale: placeOrder returns immediate ack/reject like a REST response; fills/cancels arrive asynchronously as OrderEvents via onEvent, mirroring real exchange WS delivery.
nodes.norm_label: async fill delivery mirrors exchange ws

nodes.label: Idempotency marked before network call
nodes.rationale: Three gates: idempotency, decision-gate (mode+risk), then mark idempotency BEFORE the network call to prevent a race on retry; never resubmit same clientOrderId.

nodes.label: Explicit validated transitions are sole truth
nodes.rationale: Any transition not in the table is a bug and is rejected; single source of truth for what can happen next to an order. CANCEL_PENDING may still fill before cancel lands.
nodes.norm_label: explicit validated transitions are sole truth

nodes.label: Crash recovery rebuilds from exchange truth
nodes.rationale: On restart never trust local store alone; rebuild each live order's state from exchange truth. A timed-out submit that actually landed is adopted, not lost or double-sent. SUBMITTED orders not yet visible (REST lag) are left, not cancelled.
nodes.norm_label: crash recovery rebuilds from exchange truth

nodes.label: Paper orders never persisted
nodes.rationale: Paper orders are simulation artifacts, never written to durable store. Only non-terminal real orders loaded on restart so idempotency and crash recovery survive.

nodes.label: Paper emits identical OrderEvents
nodes.rationale: Simulates an exchange without touching real markets but emits the exact same OrderEvents as a real adapter so the registry/treasury behave identically. Limit fill model: sell fills when bestBid>=P, buy when bestAsk<=P.

nodes.label: One gated path; adapter chosen by mode
nodes.rationale: Every order travels one path: Mode->Risk->Treasury->Idempotency->Adapter->Registry. Execution is dumb and sovereign. PAPER_MODE uses paper engine, NORMAL uses real adapter; READ_ONLY/HALT rejected at mode gate. Registered before sending so a crash mid-submit leaves a record; on throw mark FAILED but do not clear idempotency.
nodes.norm_label: one gated path; adapter chosen by mode

nodes.label: Real fills come from reconciler not adapter
nodes.rationale: Real adapters emit ORDER_OPENED/ORDER_REJECTED only; fills are NOT emitted here. Real fills are detected by the execution-sync loop (OrderReconciler against exchange truth), like an exchange delivering fills asynchronously.
nodes.norm_label: real fills come from reconciler not adapter

nodes.label: Fill dedup by fillId; exchange truth wins
nodes.rationale: All state changes go through the validated state machine, no ad-hoc mutation. Fills deduped by fillId so re-delivery/replay never double-counts. setReconciled sets absolute filled qty/status directly rather than replaying events (which would double-count) because exchange truth wins.
nodes.norm_label: fill dedup by fillid; exchange truth wins

nodes.label: Pure deterministic drift detection
nodes.rationale: Compares exchange truth against local view emitting classified DriftIssues. No I/O, side effects, or dispatch. Severity: GHOST_ORDER/DUPLICATE_FILL/NEGATIVE_INVENTORY/IMPOSSIBLE_BALANCE=CRITICAL; BALANCE_MISMATCH/MISSING_FILL/STALE_LOCAL_ORDER=HARD; TIMING_LAG=SOFT.

nodes.label: Exchange truth wins; fills appended never overwritten
nodes.rationale: Financial consensus loop: fetch truth, read local view, detect+classify, repair (exchange wins for balances/orders via full replace, fills appended+deduped never overwritten), persist report. Repair skipped on CRITICAL. CRITICAL sets requiresExecutionHalt; DB is durability/audit not truth authority.
nodes.norm_label: exchange truth wins; fills appended never overwritten

nodes.label: AES-256-GCM authenticated credential encryption
nodes.rationale: Encrypts user exchange credentials at rest using master ENCRYPTION_KEY. GCM auth tag detects tampering. Without a 64-hex key, an ephemeral key is used and stored credentials will not survive restart (dev only).

nodes.label: Only place credentials are read
nodes.rationale: The only place in the system that reads credentials from a TradingSession. Credentials captured at construction, held only by the client instance scoped to session lifetime; factory keeps no reference. WS clients are public, no credentials.

nodes.label: Authenticated client exposes REST clients, never raw keys
nodes.norm_label: authenticated client exposes rest clients, never raw keys

nodes.label: Raw credentials live only inside session, never serialized or logged
nodes.norm_label: raw credentials live only inside session, never serialized or logged

nodes.label: State recovered from exchange truth before execution gate opens
nodes.norm_label: state recovered from exchange truth before execution gate opens

nodes.label: Reducer returns same ref when unchanged to skip event emission
nodes.norm_label: reducer returns same ref when unchanged to skip event emission

nodes.label: FILL_RECEIVED dedup by fillId; balances/orders full-replace exchange truth
nodes.norm_label: fill_received dedup by fillid; balances/orders full-replace exchange truth

nodes.label: Truth model: Exchange=ultimate, StateEngine=operational, DB=checkpoint; dispatch ownership per action
nodes.norm_label: truth model: exchange=ultimate, stateengine=operational, db=checkpoint; dispatch ownership per action

nodes.label: READ_ONLY default mode, recoveryComplete false until recovery gate fires
nodes.norm_label: read_only default mode, recoverycomplete false until recovery gate fires

nodes.label: notify is fire-and-forget, never throws or blocks execution (audit feed)
nodes.norm_label: notify is fire-and-forget, never throws or blocks execution (audit feed)

nodes.label: Pure deterministic derivation; weighted-avg cost basis; state reconstructable from fills
nodes.norm_label: pure deterministic derivation; weighted-avg cost basis; state reconstructable from fills

nodes.label: reserveFloor splits totalBase into active vs reserve inventory
nodes.norm_label: reservefloor splits totalbase into active vs reserve inventory

nodes.label: Treasury combines fills across both exchanges (venue-agnostic ZIG holding)
nodes.norm_label: treasury combines fills across both exchanges (venue-agnostic zig holding)

nodes.label: Append-only ledger, never update/delete; dedup by unique fillId; financial source of truth
nodes.norm_label: append-only ledger, never update/delete; dedup by unique fillid; financial source of truth

nodes.label: PAPER- fills never touch durable ledger, in-memory only
nodes.norm_label: paper- fills never touch durable ledger, in-memory only

nodes.label: Sequence state machine: monotonic increase only, not strict +1; avoids reconnect loops
nodes.norm_label: sequence state machine: monotonic increase only, not strict +1; avoids reconnect loops

nodes.label: Heartbeat/pong/stale timers detect silent websocket desync and force reconnect
nodes.norm_label: heartbeat/pong/stale timers detect silent websocket desync and force reconnect

nodes.label: Operator routes require x-operator-token; mode gates trading (canTrade)
nodes.norm_label: operator routes require x-operator-token; mode gates trading (cantrade)

hyperedges.label: Control-plane security chain (rate-limit, token, sanitize, audit)
